Package neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops

Class TPflashSAFT

java.lang.Object
neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.BaseOperation
neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops.Flash
neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops.TPflash
neqsim.thermodynamicoperations.flashops.TPflashSAFT
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Runnable, OperationInterface
public class TPflashSAFT extends TPflash
TP flash for SAFT-VR Mie equation of state.

Uses successive substitution with separate single-phase systems for liquid and gas volume solving. This avoids the issue where the SAFT volume solver cannot find both gas and liquid roots at the feed composition (unlike cubic EOS where the cubic always has mathematical roots).

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • run

      Calculate the following properties:

      • minimumGibbsEnergy
      • minGibsPhaseLogZ

    • tryLiquidLiquidSplit

      private void tryLiquidLiquidSplit(double T, double P, double[] z, double[] Kvle, double betaVLE, double[] xLiq, double[] yGas)
      Attempt to split the liquid phase into two liquid phases (VLLE).

      After a converged VLE flash, checks if the liquid phase is unstable with respect to liquid-liquid splitting. Uses successive substitution on a 3-phase Rachford-Rice formulation.

      Parameters:
      T - temperature in K
      P - pressure in bar
      z - feed mole fractions
      Kvle - VLE K-values from 2-phase flash
      betaVLE - vapor fraction from 2-phase flash
      xLiq - liquid composition from 2-phase flash
      yGas - gas composition from 2-phase flash

    • solveRachfordRice

      private double solveRachfordRice(double[] z, double[] K, double betaGuess)
      Solve Rachford-Rice equation for vapor fraction using bisection.
      Parameters:
      z - feed mole fractions
      K - K-values
      betaGuess - initial guess for vapor fraction
      Returns:
      vapor fraction beta

    • solve3PhaseRachfordRice

      private double[] solve3PhaseRachfordRice(double[] z, double[] KV, double[] KLL, double betaV0, double betaL10)
      Solve 3-phase Rachford-Rice equations using Newton's method.

      The 3-phase R-R equations are: F1 = sum_i z_i*(K_V_i-1) / [1 + betaV*(K_V_i-1) + betaL1*(K_LL_i-1)] = 0 F2 = sum_i z_i*(K_LL_i-1) / [1 + betaV*(K_V_i-1) + betaL1*(K_LL_i-1)] = 0

      Parameters:
      z - feed mole fractions
      KV - vapor K-values (relative to L2 reference phase)
      KLL - liquid-liquid K-values (L2/L1)
      betaV0 - initial guess for vapor fraction
      betaL10 - initial guess for liquid1 fraction
      Returns:
      array {betaV, betaL1}

    • normalize

      private void normalize(double[] comp)
      Normalize a composition array in place.
      Parameters:
      comp - composition array to normalize

    • computeFugacityCoefficients

      private double[] computeFugacityCoefficients(double T, double P, double[] comp, PhaseType pt)
      Compute fugacity coefficients for a given composition using a fresh SAFT system.
      Parameters:
      T - temperature in K
      P - pressure in bar
      comp - mole fractions
      pt - phase type (determines which volume root to find)
      Returns:
      array of fugacity coefficients, or null if computation fails

    • computeGibbsEnergy

      private double computeGibbsEnergy(double T, double P, double[] comp, PhaseType pt)
      Compute Gibbs energy for a composition and phase type.
      Parameters:
      T - temperature in K
      P - pressure in bar
      comp - mole fractions
      pt - phase type
      Returns:
      Gibbs energy, or NaN if computation fails
